mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_protocol_kafka (protocol_id, bootstrap_servers, topic, key_serializer, value_serializer, acks, retries, batch_size, linger_ms, buffer_memory, headers, status) VALUES (#{protocolId}, #{bootstrapServers}, #{topic}, #{keySerializer}, #{valueSerializer}, #{acks}, #{retries}, #{batchSize}, #{lingerMs}, #{bufferMemory}, #{headers}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_protocol_kafka SET protocol_id = #{protocolId}, bootstrap_servers = #{bootstrapServers}, topic = #{topic}, key_serializer = #{keySerializer}, value_serializer = #{valueSerializer}, acks = #{acks}, retries = #{retries}, batch_size = #{batchSize}, linger_ms = #{lingerMs}, buffer_memory = #{bufferMemory}, headers = #{headers}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, protocol_id, bootstrap_servers, topic, key_serializer, value_serializer, acks, retries, batch_size, linger_ms, buffer_memory, headers, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_protocol_kafka WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, protocol_id, bootstrap_servers, topic, key_serializer, value_serializer, acks, retries, batch_size, linger_ms, buffer_memory, headers, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_protocol_kafka ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, protocol_id, bootstrap_servers, topic, key_serializer, value_serializer, acks, retries, batch_size, linger_ms, buffer_memory, headers, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_protocol_kafka WHERE protocol_id = #{protocolId}
